metadata.description: Dzmitry Bahaslouski plugin marketplace for Claude Code

plugins.name: java-spotless
plugins.description: Automatically runs Spotless formatter on Java files after every edit or write

plugins.name: note-taker
plugins.description: Transform meeting transcripts into structured notes with key points, decisions, action items, and follow-ups

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Streamlined Git commit command with auto-generated messages and preview

plugins.name: notebooklm
plugins.description: Interact with Google NotebookLM from Claude Code — create notebooks, add sources, generate audio overviews, quizzes, flashcards, and chat with your research
